knowledge_atoms.text: 3. In summer, the tree was green. Now ...
knowledge_atoms.gloss: 3. 在夏天，树是绿色的。现在……

knowledge_atoms.text: 4. There was a building before. Now ...
knowledge_atoms.gloss: 4. 以前这里有一栋楼。现在……

knowledge_atoms.text: 5. The cat was on the chair. Now ...
At that time, there were no gyms.
Before, I was quiet. Now, I'm very active in class.
knowledge_atoms.gloss: 以前，我很安静。现在，我在课堂上很活跃。

knowledge_atoms.text: Changes are all around us. Talk about the changes below.
knowledge_atoms.gloss: 变化在我们周围无处不在。谈论下面的变化。

knowledge_atoms.text: Could you see stars at night?
Cross out the words you didn't hear.
knowledge_atoms.gloss: 划掉你没有听到的单词。

knowledge_atoms.text: I couldn't run fast or play basketball well.
knowledge_atoms.gloss: 我跑不快，篮球也打得不好。

knowledge_atoms.text: I didn't like PE class very much.
I didn't like winter before. I thought it was too cold, and I couldn't go cycling.
I thought it was too cold, and I couldn't go cycling.
knowledge_atoms.gloss: 我觉得太冷了，而且我不能去骑自行车。

knowledge_atoms.text: I was short, so I couldn't ride my bike well.
knowledge_atoms.gloss: 我以前很矮，所以我自行车骑得不好。

knowledge_atoms.text: John, come and look at Mike's old photos!
Listen to a dialogue about a dream and fill in the missing past tense verbs.
knowledge_atoms.gloss: 听一段关于梦的对话并填入缺失的过去式动词。

knowledge_atoms.text: No, so I didn't like PE class very much. I couldn't run fast or play basketball well.
Now I love to ice-skate, so I like winter.
knowledge_atoms.gloss: 现在我喜欢滑冰，所以我喜欢冬天。

knowledge_atoms.text: Now there's a new one in our school.
knowledge_atoms.gloss: 现在我们学校里有一个新的。

knowledge_atoms.text: Right. Before, I was quiet. Now, I'm very active in class. How about you?
That's funny, Mike! You're wearing a pink T-shirt.
There was no gym in my school thirty years ago.
knowledge_atoms.gloss: 三十年前我的学校里没有体育馆。

knowledge_atoms.text: There was no library in my old school.
knowledge_atoms.gloss: 我以前的学校里没有图书馆。

knowledge_atoms.text: There were no computers or Internet in my time.
knowledge_atoms.gloss: 我那个时候没有电脑或互联网。

knowledge_atoms.text: Understand a narrative story in the past tense.
knowledge_atoms.gloss: 理解一篇过去时的叙事故事。

knowledge_atoms.text: Understand the changes in human life and the environment over time.
knowledge_atoms.gloss: 理解人类生活和环境随时间的演变。

knowledge_atoms.text: We didn't have a library, and there weren't any computer rooms at all.
knowledge_atoms.gloss: 我们以前没有图书馆，而且根本没有任何电脑室。

knowledge_atoms.text: We should help the earth now to make it a better place.
knowledge_atoms.gloss: 我们现在应该保护地球，让它成为一个更好的地方。
爷爷的学校是什么样的？

knowledge_atoms.text: What was your school like five years ago?
knowledge_atoms.gloss: 五年前你的学校是什么样的？

knowledge_atoms.text: Wow, a library! There was no library in my old school.
Write sentences about an interesting dream using the simple past tense.
knowledge_atoms.gloss: 运用一般过去时写几句关于一个有趣梦境的话。

knowledge_atoms.text: You weren't very big then, Mr Wu!

page_lessons.page_intro_cn: Theme: Then and now. Grandpa, Wu Binbin, a woman and Mr Wu are looking at an old group photo on the wall.
entry_probe_questions: Can you say: You weren't very big then.

page_lessons.page_intro_cn: Theme: Then and now. Wu Binbin, a woman, and an old man are looking at a model of a school.
entry_probe_questions: Do you know the word library?
Can you say: Our school was small!

page_lessons.page_intro_cn: Theme: Then and now. Grandpa, Sarah and Wu Binbin are looking at pictures of the old and new school.
entry_probe_questions: Do you know the word library?
Can you say: There was no library in my old school.

page_lessons.page_intro_cn: Theme: Then and now. Wu Binbin and his father are looking at the school buildings, including a dining hall, a gym, and grass.
entry_probe_questions: Do you know the word dining hall?
Can you say: There was no gym in my school thirty years ago.

page_lessons.page_intro_cn: Theme: Then and now. Chen Jie, John and Mike are looking at Mike's old photos and talking about how they have changed.
entry_probe_questions: Do you know the word different?
Can you say: Before, I was quiet. Now, I'm very active in class.

page_lessons.page_intro_cn: Theme: Then and now. Illustrations of people doing different activities: cycling, ice-skating, and playing badminton. Below is a dialogue between Wu Binbin and Mike.
entry_probe_questions: Do you know the word go cycling?
Can you say: I didn't like winter before.

page_lessons.page_intro_cn: Theme: Then and now. A story about Wu Binbin's dream where he races with his father, Max, and a cheetah.
entry_probe_questions: Do you know the word race?
Can you say: Understand a narrative story in the past tense.

page_lessons.page_intro_cn: Theme: What a dream!. 吴斌斌坐在床上给妈妈讲他昨晚做的有趣的梦，妈妈坐在床边认真听。
entry_probe_questions: Do you know the word had?
Can you say: Listen to a dialogue about a dream and fill in the missing past tense verbs.

page_lessons.page_intro_cn: Theme: Changes are all around us.. 听力练习，要求学生听音频为三幅运动/休闲场景图片标号，并从给定的词汇列表中划掉音频中未提及的单词。
entry_probe_questions: Do you know the word gym?
Can you say: Listen and number the pictures.

page_lessons.page_intro_cn: Theme: Story time. Zip和Zoom通过观看三组关于过去、现在和未来的对比画面（人类烹饪方式的演变、地球环境的变化、鲸鱼生存状态的改变），讨论人类生活、环境保护及动物保护的主题。
entry_probe_questions: Do you know the word cavemen?
Can you say: Understand the changes in human life and the environment over time.

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Understand and say the core dialogue pattern on the page.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: Grandpa, Wu Binbin, a woman and Mr Wu are looking at an old group photo on the wall. Key patterns: You weren't very big then.; I didn't like PE class very much.
core_patterns: You weren't very big then.
I didn't like PE class very much.
I couldn't run fast or play basketball well.
Binbin, that's your father.
You weren't very big then, Mr Wu!
No, so I didn't like PE class very much. I couldn't run fast or play basketball well.
allowed_answer_scope: You weren't very big then, Mr Wu!
No, so I didn't like PE class very much. I couldn't run fast or play basketball well.
entry_probe_questions: Can you say: You weren't very big then.
return_anchors: I didn't like PE class very much.
I couldn't run fast or play basketball well.

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Understand and say the core dialogue pattern on the page.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: Wu Binbin, a woman, and an old man are looking at a model of a school. Key patterns: Our school was small!; We didn't have a library, and there weren't any computer rooms at all.
core_patterns: Our school was small!
We didn't have a library, and there weren't any computer rooms at all.
There was no gym either!
allowed_answer_scope: We didn't have a library, and there weren't any computer rooms at all.
entry_probe_questions: Do you know the word library?
Can you say: Our school was small!
return_anchors: We didn't have a library, and there weren't any computer rooms at all.

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Catch the key information from the listening task.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: Today, there is a guest visiting the school. Listen and tick or cross. Key patterns: Listen and tick or cross.
core_patterns: Listen and tick or cross.
entry_probe_questions: Can you say: Listen and tick or cross.

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Understand and say the core dialogue pattern on the page.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: Grandpa, Sarah and Wu Binbin are looking at pictures of the old and new school. Key patterns: There was no library in my old school.; There were no computers or Internet in my time.
core_patterns: There was no library in my old school.
There were no computers or Internet in my time.
What was Grandpa's school like?
Could you see stars at night?
How do you know that?
Wow, a library! There was no library in my old school.
allowed_answer_scope: Wow, a library! There was no library in my old school.
Tell us about your school, please.
There was only one small building on a hill.
Me too. One day I'm going to visit the moon.
The Americans took about five days to get there in 1969.
entry_probe_questions: Do you know the word library?
Can you say: There was no library in my old school.
return_anchors: There was no library in my old school.
There were no computers or Internet in my time.

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Transfer the page language into a new speaking task.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: Students draw their school 5 years ago and now, then talk about the changes. Key patterns: What was your school like five years ago?; What is it like now?
core_patterns: What was your school like five years ago?
What is it like now?
There was ... / There were ...
There is ... / There are ...
allowed_answer_scope: What was your school like five years ago?
entry_probe_questions: Can you say: What was your school like five years ago?
return_anchors: What was your school like five years ago?

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Recognize and say the core vocabulary on the page.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: Wu Binbin and his father are looking at the school buildings, including a dining hall, a gym, and grass. Key patterns: There was no gym in my school thirty years ago.; Now there's a new one in our school.
core_patterns: There was no gym in my school thirty years ago.
Now there's a new one in our school.
entry_probe_questions: Do you know the word dining hall?
Can you say: There was no gym in my school thirty years ago.
return_anchors: There was no gym in my school thirty years ago.
Now there's a new one in our school.

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Transfer the page language into a new speaking task.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: A picture of the Tang dynasty showing modern mistakes like a gym, a post office, a motel, a cafe, a cinema, a bus, and people using the Internet. Key patterns: In the Tang dynasty ...; At that time, there were no gyms.
core_patterns: In the Tang dynasty ...
At that time, there were no gyms.
People didn't go by bus.
People couldn't use the Internet.
entry_probe_questions: Do you know the word Tang dynasty?
Can you say: In the Tang dynasty ...
return_anchors: At that time, there were no gyms.

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Catch the key information from the listening task.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: Mike's friends are visiting his home. Key patterns: Listen and circle.
core_patterns: Listen and circle.
entry_probe_questions: Can you say: Listen and circle.

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Understand and say the core dialogue pattern on the page.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: Chen Jie, John and Mike are looking at Mike's old photos and talking about how they have changed. Key patterns: Before, I was quiet. Now, I'm very active in class.; I was short, so I couldn't ride my bike well.
core_patterns: Before, I was quiet. Now, I'm very active in class.
I was short, so I couldn't ride my bike well.
How did Mike change?
Right. Before, I was quiet. Now, I'm very active in class. How about you?
John, come and look at Mike's old photos!
That's funny, Mike! You're wearing a pink T-shirt.
allowed_answer_scope: John, come and look at Mike's old photos!
That's funny, Mike! You're wearing a pink T-shirt.
Yes, but I don't like pink now.
Well, I was short, so I couldn't ride my bike well. Now, I go cycling every day. I like it very much.
entry_probe_questions: Do you know the word different?
Can you say: Before, I was quiet. Now, I'm very active in class.
return_anchors: Before, I was quiet. Now, I'm very active in class.
I was short, so I couldn't ride my bike well.

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Use the page dialogue pattern in short guided practice.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: Students talk about how their friends or family members changed using the given phrases. Key patterns: wasn't tall/...; had long/... hair
core_patterns: wasn't tall/...
had long/... hair
didn't wear glasses/...
didn't like maths/...
didn't like cats/...
didn't like eggs/...
entry_probe_questions: Can you say: wasn't tall/...
branchable_topics: Talk about your friends or family members. How did they change?

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Recognize and say the core vocabulary on the page.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: Illustrations of people doing different activities: cycling, ice-skating, and playing badminton. Below is a dialogue between Wu Binbin and Mike. Key patterns: I didn't like winter before.; I thought it was too cold, and I couldn't go cycling.
core_patterns: I didn't like winter before.
I thought it was too cold, and I couldn't go cycling.
How about now?
Now I love to ice-skate, so I like winter.
I didn't like winter before. I thought it was too cold, and I couldn't go cycling.
allowed_answer_scope: I didn't like winter before. I thought it was too cold, and I couldn't go cycling.
Now I love to ice-skate, so I like winter.
entry_probe_questions: Do you know the word go cycling?
Can you say: I didn't like winter before.
return_anchors: I thought it was too cold, and I couldn't go cycling.

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Catch the key information from the listening task.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: A matching exercise with pictures of items (swimming ring, bicycle, cooking pan, badminton rackets, piano, ice skates, erhu) and three people (Allen, Diana, Joe). Wu Binbin is pointing at the pictures and providing a sentence template. Key patterns: Listen, match and say
core_patterns: Listen, match and say

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Review and consolidate the core language point.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: 本单元复习环节。通过展示多组对比图片（如鸡蛋变母鸡、雨天变晴天、树叶四季变化等），引导学生运用一般过去时和一般现在时谈论周围事物的变化。 Key patterns: Changes are all around us. Talk about the changes below.; 1. It was an egg. Now ...
core_patterns: Changes are all around us. Talk about the changes below.
1. It was an egg. Now ...
2. It was raining. Now ...
3. In summer, the tree was green. Now ...
4. There was a building before. Now ...
5. The cat was on the chair. Now ...
allowed_answer_scope: Changes are all around us. Talk about the changes below.
3. In summer, the tree was green. Now ...
entry_probe_questions: Can you say: Changes are all around us. Talk about the changes below.
return_anchors: Changes are all around us. Talk about the changes below.
